examples: He was forceful, but by no means a zealot.
He was a man of forceful character, with considerable insight and diplomatic skills.
You may need to be armed with some forceful arguments to persuade a partner into seeing things your way.
Doubles is a fast-paced affair that turns on strong serves and forceful returns of serve.
On other occasions, the most effective approach is to be forceful, outspoken and demanding.
